flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hudson County Community College are 21% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.3k vs $43.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hudson County Community College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.0k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hudson County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hudson County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
